textByHashes.928fad79355cd659ebfa9a7e74b3a5fc151231aa: What have you got to be so cheerful about?
textByHashes.6c42c3b26dd9f86c28947d131c33843efc41e0ca: Ha! Try worrying about how you feed a family with no job. Then tell me how nice the day is!
textByHashes.e8564595bda4c9369eccaed2b5827906df08ed0a: It's nothing stranger. No need to concern yourself.
textByHashes.bbbd9715f4495bb38c6884c42c53501f3d536473: For a poor unemployed fisherman what needs to eat.
textByHashes.4c223f41e6480c431a74f260304956ef217a3b89: Can you believe they did this to us?
textByHashes.862500e24460053682611ba6a1c2c527eb27fb19: I mean, what did they think would happen?
textByHashes.05826181d2a98783b4c63381504f1247e03e7288: Building that whacking great Fishing Platform just off the coast.
textByHashes.93325bdff4557ab74626d9b5dcf73f27bbcde71f: Dratted thing stole all of our trade.
textByHashes.5a74bbe80621bd9735f7190d8fe3458f88f7558a: I'm sorry, I'm too angry to speak right now. Goodbye
textByHashes.6c3a6ba691c60859fc8de9d728a4b6976cb5c16e: With our nets and gear we're faring,
textByHashes.a74e2058c5cd7eee920e2b629da69cd99fd91ef4: On the wild and wasteful ocean,
textByHashes.efc0bd74f7b2780c0ae2f3f5a719830a3503f752: It's there on the deep that we harvest and reap our bread,
textByHashes.6745258d056b774e9f7ca1fa25e7387de2fac42c: As we hunt the bonny shoals of herring.
textByHashes.723917842e694a934840f9ee1f42007bec222117: Aye lad, and sing it every day we did.
textByHashes.f5c8dc03e8ff7f5e8ccc4f87f9471ceb3158e538: 'Till the Fishing Platform came and ruined everything.
textByHashes.75f8d5147be6a2f30488a4df2f746a6377749792: No need lad, it not be your fault.
textByHashes.56494c6e2f4fddfab595a8154205acbf24dd9490: Ye mariners all, as ye pass by,
textByHashes.eaf58a334f25b701425033a80521eaee9578d1c3: Come in and drink if you are dry,
textByHashes.9aee5c51440a76a45152ddffe6fd11795a9089ff: Come spend, me lads, your money brisk,
textByHashes.e6842a6f0a5cf2c55c78cfd4fcff4ce7d98a479c: And pop your nose in a jug of this.
textByHashes.a77db85f14f56b4d17f1ad30c727e3b2b7a46094: Our Prince, you killed our Prince.
textByHashes.fea389d3f3e993952a2e64194e2a971c40aae267: Do not worry, soon your regret will be gone.
